title: Clear Nether Portals
description: A texture pack that removes the nether portal texture, so that it is completely invisible.
body:
# Clear Nether Portals
Clear Nether Portals is a resource pack that removes the visual texture of Nether portal blocks, making them fully transparent.
## Features
- Makes Nether portal blocks completely clear
- Removes the vanilla purple swirling texture
- Improves visibility through portals
- Visual change only, no gameplay impact
## **Why use this pack?**
The default Nether portal texture can be visually distracting and block your view. This pack replaces it with a fully transparent look, allowing you to see clearly through portals while keeping their functionality unchanged.
